name: Oficina SOAT - Persistencia e Mensageria Lab
description: Persistencia PostgreSQL e DynamoDB, Outbox, SNS/SQS, DLQ e idempotencia dos microsservicos no ambiente lab. Substitua accountIds [0] pelo ID da conta New Relic antes de importar.

pages.name: Dependencias
pages.description: Sinais operacionais de persistencia, mensageria, Outbox e idempotencia.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(persistence_operations_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'operacoes/min' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, database, result TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT max(persistence_operation_duration_seconds_max) * 1000 AS 'max ms' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, database, resource TIMESERIES
FROM Metric SELECT latest(outbox_pending_count) AS 'pendentes' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, eventType

widgets.title: Idade do evento mais antigo da Outbox

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT latest(outbox_oldest_pending_age) AS 'segundos' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(outbox_published_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'publicados/min' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, eventType, topic TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Eventos publicados, consumidos e com falha

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(messaging_events_published_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'publicados/min', rate(sum(messaging_events_consumed_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'consumidos/min', rate(sum(messaging_events_failed_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'falhas/min' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(messaging_sqs_received_count_total), 1 minute) AS 'recebidas/min' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, queue, topic TIMESERIES
FROM Metric SELECT sum(messaging_dlq_count_total) AS 'DLQ' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, queue, topic SINCE 24 hours ago
FROM Metric SELECT sum(idempotency_retries_count_total) AS 'retries' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, operation, status SINCE 24 hours ago

FROM Metric SELECT sum(idempotency_conflicts_count_total) AS 'conflitos' WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, operation, reason SINCE 24 hours ago
